title: Industrial Property Consultant
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a motivated and analytical individual to join our consultancy team as an Industrial Property Consultant. In this role, you will work closely with industrial clients to develop a thorough understanding of their business operations, financial position, workforce profile and operational requirements. This understanding will be applied to support property-related decisions that have direct implications on the client’s operations, cost structure and long-term planning.

The role is primarily analytical and report-driven. This position is well suited to individuals who are comfortable working with data, structured documentation requirements and who enjoy producing clear and substantiated reports.

Key Responsibilities

Business and Operational Assessment

• Review clients’ financial statements.
• Analyze clients’ business models and operational workflows.
• Review employee headcount, manpower composition and organizational structure.
• Assess operational scale, space utilization and site requirements.

Property Planning Support and Reporting

• Prepare structured analyses for industrial property planning.
• Draft reports for property-related applications.
• Develop structured strategies relating to space requirements and site usage.
• Ensure reports and submissions are accurate, consistent and complete.

Coordination and Engagement

• Obtain information and data from clients.
• Clarify data and assumptions with relevant parties.
• Respond to queries on reports and supporting materials.
• Coordinate documentation with internal and external parties.
• Manage multiple assignments and timelines concurrently.

Qualifications and Requirements

• Ability to review and interpret financial statements.
• Strong analytical capability.
• Strong written communication and report-writing skills.
• Proficiency in Microsoft Word and Excel.
• Organized and detail-oriented.
• Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines.
• Diploma or higher qualification in any discipline.
• Prior experience in business analysis, reporting, consultancy support or property-related roles is an advantage.

What We Offer

• Competitive monthly remuneration.
• Performance-based incentives.
• Annual performance bonus and Annual Wage Supplement.
• On-the-job training and guidance.
• Professional and collaborative working environment.
